    • buildReturnJson

      public static String buildReturnJson(DocJavaMethod docJavaMethod, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder)
      build return json
      参数:
      docJavaMethod - The JavaMethod object
      builder - ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder
      返回:
      String

    • buildJson

      public static String buildJson(String typeName, String genericCanonicalName, boolean isResp, int counter, Map<String,String> registryClasses, Set<String> groupClasses, Set<String> methodJsonViewClasses, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
      Builds a JSON string representation of a given type.
      参数:
      typeName - The name of the type.
      genericCanonicalName - The canonical name of the generic type.
      isResp - Flag indicating if this is a response.
      counter - The recursion counter.
      registryClasses - A map to keep track of processed classes.
      groupClasses - A set of valid group classes.
      methodJsonViewClasses - A set of valid `@JsonView` classes on controller method.
      projectBuilder - The project config projectBuilder.
      返回:
      The JSON string representation of the type.

    • buildMapJson

      public static void buildMapJson(String genericCanonicalName, boolean isResp, int counter, Map<String,String> registryClasses, Set<String> groupClasses, Set<String> methodJsonViewClasses, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, StringBuilder data, int nextLevel)
      build map json
      参数:
      genericCanonicalName - genericCanonicalName
      isResp - isResp
      counter - counter
      registryClasses - registryClasses
      groupClasses - groupClasses
      methodJsonViewClasses - methodJsonViewClasses
      builder - builder
      data - StringBuilder data
      nextLevel - nextLevel
